title: HorrorMinima
body:
![HorrorMinima](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7b89f30a3958df677f30321b15ed31c6f52121f.png)
#  _💀About the resource pack💀_
This chilling resource pack transforms Minecraft into a nightmarish alternate universe, drenching every block, sound, and shadow in pure dread. It doesn’t just tweak textures — it reimagines the entire world through a lens of horror. Every step you take feels watched. This isn’t just a scary reskin — it’s a complete psychological overhaul of Minecraft’s soul, turning your peaceful sandbox into a relentless, atmospheric horror experience.
##  _×͜×Why need a pack resource×͜×_
This resource pack is a must-have if you’re aiming to create a truly terrifying build — or simply want to dive into a spine-chilling version of Minecraft. Whether you're crafting a haunted mansion or surviving the night with your heart pounding, it sets the perfect eerie tone for every block you place and every step you take.

_What add resource pack?_
<details>
<summary>All</summary>
 A hellish update
  </details>

### 🤝About the development team🤝
3 people worked on the texture pack, and we will be happy to see downloads and likes. We will update the texture pack.

<details>
<summary>Thanks for downloading</summary>

We are very happy if you like the texture pack.

</details>
